allowed_ips.description: List of IP addresses or CIDR ranges permitted to access the Azure Search service; must be valid IPv4 addresses or CIDR blocks.

authentication_failure_mode.description: Determines the behavior when authentication fails; valid options are 'Http401' or 'Http403'.

customer_managed_key_enforcement_enabled.description: Enforces the use of customer-managed keys for encryption; must be set to true or false.

hosting_mode.description: Determines the hosting mode for the Azure Search service, either "default" or "high_density".

identity.description: Defines the managed identity configuration for the Azure Cognitive Search service, enabling secure access to other Azure resources.

local_authentication_enabled.description: Controls whether local authentication is enabled for the search service; must be `true` or `false`.

name.description: Specifies the unique name of the Azure Search Service, must be globally unique and adhere to Azure naming conventions.

partition_count.description: Number of partitions for the Azure Cognitive Search service, must be between 1 and 12.

public_network_access_enabled.description: Specifies whether the service can be accessed over the public internet.

replica_count.description: Specifies the number of replicas for the Azure Search service, which determines the number of copies of the search index. Must be between 1 and 12.

semantic_search_sku.description: Specifies the pricing tier for semantic search capabilities, such as 'Standard' or 'Premium'.

sku.description: Defines the pricing tier for the Azure Cognitive Search service, such as Free, Basic, or Standard.

tags.description: Key-value pairs to categorize and organize the resource, supporting resource management and cost tracking.

timeouts.description: Defines custom timeouts for create, read, update, and delete operations, allowing adjustments to default operation durations.

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
